title: Controlled Production Limits
hard_rule: Never exceed 50 pages/day without explicit approval. 0 pages/day acceptable if demand weak.

week_1.stop_if: pages not indexed after 7 days → improve quality

week_2.stop_if: discovered-not-indexed ratio worsens OR no impressions after 14 days

week_3_4.required: indexed pages increasing, impressions increasing, 0 errors

month_2.required: indexing rate >= 40%, impressions growing, data assets published

month_3_6.strategy: Scale winning DBs only. Kill losing DBs.

deployment_rules.frequency: Every 2-3 days (gives Google time to process)

kill_rules: Any DB with <10 indexed after 100 pages in 21 days = KILL. Any batch with quality issues = halt to 0.
